speaker: [player]
text: I'm not comfortable with the trespassing. But — what about the rooftop? It's technically still school property but it's not restricted the same way.

speaker: Dirtus
text: The rooftop is actually HIGHER than the tunnel. Closer to the moon. That's... that's better, actually.

speaker: Grubwin
text: The rooftop door is usually unlocked from the inside during the evening janitorial round.

speaker: Grubwin
text: I go up there to think sometimes.

speaker: Vermia
text: GRUBWIN. You've been communing with Scatha and never told me—

speaker: Grubwin
text: I've been sitting on a roof to be alone, it's different.

speaker: Vermia
text: [player] you've solved it. Rooftop summoning. Slide eight needs minor revisions.
